windows_omen_login.rule: Local fallback only; not an end-user or provider-admin substitute.

azure_cli.prior_account_rule: Do not use for production AI_OS cloud resources unless separately approved.

recovery_email_class.rule: Separate from primary Microsoft reset loop.

break_glass_account.rule: Independent from same Microsoft reset loop.

implementation_phases.name: Repo, T9, and identity baseline
implementation_phases.future_action: Confirm clean repo, T9 savepoint, and identity inventory.
implementation_phases.gate: Clean Git status, current origin/main, and T9 savepoint approval.

implementation_phases.name: Cloudflare account/admin identity confirmation
implementation_phases.future_action: Confirm Cloudflare admin account class, owner, recovery paths, and second admin path.
implementation_phases.gate: Anthony manual confirmation; no API tokens.

implementation_phases.name: Cloudflare Access application design
implementation_phases.future_action: Define Access application, policies, groups, session settings, and deny-by-default behavior.

implementation_phases.name: Microsoft/Entra primary provider setup plan
implementation_phases.future_action: Plan Microsoft/Entra as primary admin login provider.
implementation_phases.gate: Confirm AI TRADEZ portal profile and recovery separation.
implementation_phases.stop_point: Stop before Entra or Cloudflare provider setup.

implementation_phases.name: GitHub backup provider setup plan
implementation_phases.gate: Confirm GitHub account health and recovery path.
implementation_phases.stop_point: Stop before GitHub OAuth or provider setup.

implementation_phases.name: Google optional fallback decision
implementation_phases.future_action: Decide whether Google improves recovery or creates account sprawl.
implementation_phases.gate: Anthony decision with independent recovery evidence.
implementation_phases.stop_point: Stop before Google OAuth or provider setup.

implementation_phases.name: Cloudflare OTP emergency fallback constraints
implementation_phases.future_action: Define allowed OTP addresses and emergency-only use.
implementation_phases.gate: Confirm OTP mailbox is independently recoverable.

implementation_phases.name: Break-glass account and recovery procedure
implementation_phases.future_action: Define owner, account class, MFA/recovery separation, and drill cadence.
implementation_phases.stop_point: Stop before relying on break-glass for exposure.

implementation_phases.name: Turnstile site and secret handling plan
implementation_phases.future_action: Define site key use, secret storage outside repo, and backend verification.
implementation_phases.stop_point: Stop before Turnstile creation or secret handling.

implementation_phases.name: Local dashboard exposure boundary
implementation_phases.stop_point: Stop before DNS, tunnel, or dashboard exposure.

implementation_phases.name: Dry proof before remote exposure
implementation_phases.future_action: Prove Access login paths, denial behavior, no-secret status, and local fallback.

implementation_phases.name: Staged implementation packet
implementation_phases.future_action: Generate exact APPLY packets for one provider change at a time.
implementation_phases.gate: Separate Anthony approval for each provider action.
implementation_phases.stop_point: Stop after each packet and validation.

implementation_phases.name: Rollback and lockout drill
implementation_phases.future_action: Run safe lockout drill, verify rollback path, and record proof.
implementation_phases.stop_point: Stop after clean Git status and T9 savepoint.

preconditions: Azure Portal uses AI TRADEZ dedicated browser profile
recovery email class is separate from Microsoft reset loop
Cloudflare admin has two recovery paths

rules: do not bypass repo or AI_OS protected-action gates

google.decision: Use only if it provides independent recovery without account sprawl.

constraints: not trapped in primary Microsoft reset loop

rules: public site key may be in browser
secret key must stay outside repo
passing Turnstile grants no app role or action authority

required_controls: break-glass account independent from same Microsoft reset loop
recovery email separated from primary Microsoft account
lockout_controls.dashboard_exposure_rule: Dashboard remains blocked until Access policy is proven.

before_each_provider_apply: record current provider state with screenshots/manual confirmation only
confirm at least two admin access paths
define backout path for exact provider change
stop if primary and backup logins are not both available
after_each_provider_apply: verify git status clean after merge
create T9 savepoint after major merge
rollback_plan.lockout_response: Stop and revert only the last provider change using the last known admin path; do not make additional provider changes while locked out or partially locked out.

proof_requirements: Cloudflare Access test user can log in
Microsoft primary admin can log in
break-glass path is tested without using daily admin
Turnstile token validation is proven in backend only
dashboard is inaccessible without Cloudflare Access
git status clean after each step
T9 savepoint after each major merge
AI_OS approval gates still control protected actions

next_packet.purpose: Prepare Cloudflare provider setup checklist before any provider dashboard change.
